required_outcome: Create a new change directory with a stable change id and initialized change artifacts.
guardrails: Map every generated suggestion directly to the documented runectx command and flags.
Do not execute any follow-up command automatically after change creation.
Keep all proposed mutations reviewable and explicit to the user.
decision_rules: If required title or type is missing, ask for those values before proposing command execution.
If optional values are not provided, omit their flags instead of inventing defaults.
After command completion, stop and report the resulting change id and path.
workflow_steps: Collect missing required and optional command inputs.
Present a single explicit runectx command proposal for review.
Execute or instruct execution of runectx change new.
Return the created change id and immediate output fields only.
stop_condition: Stop immediately after reporting change creation output and do not chain additional workflow commands.

examples.scenario: Create a feature change with minimal inputs
examples.user_prompt: Create a new feature change titled Add adapter workflow contracts.
examples.assistant_response: I will run `runectx change new --title "Add adapter workflow contracts" --type feature` once you confirm. After it succeeds, I will report the new change id and stop.
